nasb.text: They put his weapons in the temple of Ashtaroth, and they fastened his body to the wall of Beth-shan.

esv.text: They put his armor in the temple of Ashtaroth, and they fastened his body to the wall of Beth-shan.

cnv.text: 他們把掃羅的兵器放在亞斯他錄的廟裡，又把他的屍體釘在伯．珊的城牆上。

ccb.text: 非利士人把扫罗的盔甲放在亚斯她录神庙里，把他的尸体钉在伯·珊城墙上。
